title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details - Cancel button
scenario: Find My Device Cancel (X) button dismisses device details window and returns to map with connected devices list
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected
Disconnect the device or move it out of Bluetooth range
Observe the device details window appears showing the disconnected device
Tap the Cancel (X) button on the device details window
expected: The device details window dismisses and the user is returned to the Find My Device map showing the list of connected devices.
